title: Soky's Various Things Pack
description: A mod adding a couple of decorative and (in some cases) functional blocks to the game.
body:
[![ko-fi](https://www.ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/E1E120FY7)

Soky's Various Things Pack, or SVTP for short (formerly called EVTP or Exploder's Various Things Pack) is a mod adding handful of decorative and (in some cases) functional blocks to the game.

Requires Architectury API to work. Fabric version requires Fabric API. Fabric version should work with Quilt as well as long as you're using Fabric API or (assuming it's available) Quilted Fabric API / Quilt Standard Libraries.

New blocks include:
- Armored glass (including panes and stained/tinted variants) that's as resistant to explosions as obsidian is
- Stone doors which are stronger than wooden doors, but weaken than iron ones
- Golden torch and soul torch, 2 different variants for each, a fancier alternative to normal torches
- Paper bundle, 6 different variants, decorative blocks that can be used to more compactly store paper
- Redstone lantern, a slightly more explosion-resistant alternative to redstone lamps that can also be turned on/off by hand
- Dead flower, a flower-like alternative to the dead bush, adding variety to biomes it can spawn in

Also available for 1.12.2 in [Minor Integrations and Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/minor-integrations-and-additions).

Armored glass blocks support connected textures when using [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) (but due to some issues this currently does not apply to armored glass panes).
